name: GraphRetrieval
description: Top-k semantically similar nodes from a store given a query. Learned query/key projection + softmax similarity + top-k select.
code:
_gnr{{_id}}_Wq = np.random.randn({{d_model}}, {{query}}.shape[-1]).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gnr{{_id}}_Wk = np.random.randn({{d_model}}, {{node_store}}.shape[-1]).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gnr{{_id}}_q = np.dot({{query}}.reshape(1, -1), _gnr{{_id}}_Wq.T)
_gnr{{_id}}_k = np.dot({{node_store}}, _gnr{{_id}}_Wk.T)
_gnr{{_id}}_sim = np.dot(_gnr{{_id}}_q, _gnr{{_id}}_k.T).reshape(-1)
_gnr{{_id}}_sm = np.exp(_gnr{{_id}}_sim - np.max(_gnr{{_id}}_sim))
_gnr{{_id}}_sm /= (_gnr{{_id}}_sm.sum() + 1e-9)
_gnr{{_id}}_topk = np.argsort(_gnr{{_id}}_sm)[-{{top_k}}:][::-1]
{{retrieved}} = {{node_store}}[_gnr{{_id}}_topk]
{{scores}} = _gnr{{_id}}_sm[_gnr{{_id}}_topk]
